name: Smart International School - SIS
description: Smart International School in Faiyum delivers the Cambridge IGCSE curriculum with a focus on student well-being and academic achievement.

name: Royal Semi International School
description: Royal Semi International School blends the best of national and international curricula to offer a balanced and comprehensive education.

name: Smart National School - SNS
description: Smart National School delivers a modern take on the Egyptian national curriculum, integrating technology and critical thinking into daily learning.

name: Middle East Schools (MES)
description: Middle East Schools in Faiyum provides a strong multilingual education with a focus on Arabic, English, and French language proficiency.

name: Nile Egyptian School - Faiyum
description: The NES Faiyum branch brings world-class international education to the governorate, part of Egypt's prestigious NES network.

name: Al-Iman Language School
description: Al-Iman Language School combines faith-based values with a rigorous language curriculum, serving the community of Faiyum.

name: Fayoum Future Pioneers Language School
description: Fayoum Future Pioneers prepares the next generation of leaders through an enriched academic program and strong community values.

name: College De L'Assomption Faiyum
description: A French-rooted institution offering a bilingual education with an emphasis on arts, humanities, and spiritual development.

name: San Marco Language School
description: San Marco Language School is a respected Coptic-affiliated school in Faiyum providing quality bilingual education in a nurturing environment.

name: Bright Vision International School
description: Bright Vision International School offers a forward-thinking international curriculum with state-of-the-art facilities and highly qualified teachers.
